name: workstream
description: GitHub-native, solo spec-driven workflow for planning, slicing, tracking, shipping, and opening reviewed PRs.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and ship GitHub issue work end to end
interface.longDescription: Adds a GitHub-native solo workflow for grilling a plan, publishing concise epic and task issues, slicing work into shippable sub-issues, tracking progress, implementing one slice at a time, and opening reviewed pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Grill this plan before I create issues
Create an epic from this conversation
Ship the next ready workstream issue
